creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Fix: 

Workaround: svn diff -c207790 | patch -R
Proposed fix by kientzle@: http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?4BF811C2.4050901
How-To-Repeat: 
  $ tar cf - /usr/src | tar xf -
  (hit Ctrl+T a few times)
